## What chapter and section?

Chapter: 
Section heading: 

## What's the problem?

- [ ] Content is outdated (has a date or version that's wrong)
- [ ] Content is missing (skeleton section with no content)
- [ ] Content is incorrect (factual error)
- [ ] Link is broken

## Details

<!-- What did you find? What should it say instead? -->

## How urgent?

- [ ] Blocking — I can't proceed without this
- [ ] Important — affects my understanding
- [ ] Minor — typo or formatting
